lifecycle.submitConfirmation: Your posting has been submitted for admin review

templates.selectDescription: Choose a role template to pre-fill the form

onboarding.title: Welcome to Igbo Jobs Portal
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your employer account
onboarding.step2Description: Create your first job posting — you can save as draft and edit later
onboarding.summaryNoPosting: You can create job postings anytime from your dashboard

seekerOnboarding.title: Set up your job seeker profile
seekerOnboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to start finding opportunities.
seekerOnboarding.step1Description: Tell employers about your skills and experience.
seekerOnboarding.step2Description: Set your preferences to get personalized recommendations.
seekerOnboarding.step3Description: Your profile is set up. Start exploring opportunities.
seekerOnboarding.summaryPreferencesSkipped: You can set your job preferences anytime.
seekerOnboarding.summaryCvSkipped: Upload a CV to apply faster.
seekerOnboarding.returnBanner: You haven't finished setting up. Pick up where you left off.

analytics.shareDisabledTooltip: Only active postings can be shared
analytics.shareSuccess: Job posting shared to community feed
analytics.shareDescription: Share this job posting to the community feed to increase visibility.

jobDetail.similarJobsEmpty: No similar jobs found right now.
jobDetail.similarJobsError: Could not load similar jobs. Please try again later.

admin.emptyQueueDescription: There are no job postings awaiting review.
admin.title: Title
admin.rejectDescription: Provide a reason for rejecting this posting. The employer will see this feedback.
admin.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this posting is being rejected (min. 20 characters)...
admin.rejectConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to reject this posting? This action will notify the employer.
admin.requestChangesDescription: Describe the changes needed. The employer will receive this feedback and can resubmit.
admin.requestChangesFeedbackPlaceholder: Describe the specific changes needed (min. 20 characters)...
admin.maxRevisionsReached: Maximum revision cycles reached — approve or reject
admin.approveSuccess: Posting approved and is now live
admin.decisionError: Failed to process decision. Please try again.
admin.blocklistDescription: Manage the keyword blocklist used to flag job postings during automated screening. Changes affect new submissions only — existing postings are not rescreened.
admin.blocklistEmpty: No keywords yet. Add your first phrase to begin screening.
admin.blocklistDeleteConfirm: Delete the keyword "{phrase}"? It will no longer flag new submissions. Existing postings are not affected.
admin.blocklistPhrasePlaceholder: Enter exact phrase to match (whole word, case-insensitive)...
admin.blocklistAddSuccess: Keyword added — will flag future submissions.
admin.blocklistError: Failed to save keyword. Please try again.
admin.blocklistDuplicate: This phrase already exists in the blocklist.
admin.blocklistRetroactiveWarning: Note: changes apply to new submissions only. Existing postings are not retroactively rescreened.
admin.flagModalDescription: Flag this posting for a policy violation. High-severity flags will automatically pause the posting pending review.
admin.flagDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the violation in detail (min 20 characters)...
admin.flagConfirmDescription: You are about to flag "{title}" for a policy violation.
admin.flagHighSeverityWarning: This is a high-severity flag. The posting will be automatically paused.
admin.flagError: Failed to flag posting. Please try again.
admin.flagAlreadyOpen: This posting already has an open flag. Resolve or dismiss the existing flag first.
admin.resolveError: Failed to resolve flag. Please try again.
admin.flagHistoryEmpty: No violation flags on this posting.
admin.reportsQueueSubtitle: {total, plural, one {# posting} other {# postings}} with active reports
admin.reportsActiveCount: {count, plural, one {# active report} other {# active reports}}
admin.reportsResolutionNoteHint: Minimum 20 characters. Reporters will receive an in-app notification.
admin.reportsDismissedSuccess: Reports dismissed. Posting restored if paused.
admin.reportsActionError: Failed to process. Please try again.
admin.resolveNoteTooShort: Resolution note must be at least 20 characters.
admin.verificationDetailDescription: Review the submitted documents and approve or reject this employer's verification request.
admin.verificationApproveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve this employer's verification? This will grant them a trust badge and fast-lane eligibility.
admin.verificationRejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why the verification is rejected and what the employer can do to resubmit (min 20 characters)...
admin.verificationRejectSuccess: Verification rejected. Employer has been notified.
admin.verificationRejectError: Failed to reject verification. Please try again.
admin.verificationApproveError: Failed to approve verification. Please try again.
admin.verificationRejectReasonTooShort: Rejection reason must be at least 20 characters.
admin.analyticsSubtitle: Monitor platform health and identify trends
admin.auditLogSubtitle: Track all admin actions and decisions for accountability
admin.auditEmptyStateDescription: No admin actions match the current filters.
admin.allPostingsSubtitle: Browse all job postings across all statuses
admin.postingsEmptyStateDescription: No job postings match the current filters.
admin.postingsFetchError: Failed to load postings. Showing previously loaded data.
admin.employersSubtitle: Browse all registered employers with verification and posting metrics
admin.employersEmptyStateDescription: No employers match the current filter.
admin.employersFetchError: Failed to load employers. Showing previous data.

verification.title: Verify your business
verification.subtitle: Submit official documents to earn your trust badge and unlock premium features.
verification.requiredDocumentsDescription: Upload 1-3 of the following: business registration certificate, tax ID, or equivalent official document.
verification.benefitTrustBadge: Trust badge displayed on your company profile and job postings
verification.benefitFastLane: Eligible for fast-lane approval on future job postings
verification.benefitRankingBoost: Ranking boost in search results for job seekers
verification.uploadHint: PDF or image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max 10MB each. 1-3 files required.
verification.success: Your verification request has been submitted! Our team will review your documents.
verification.error: Failed to submit verification request. Please try again.
verification.alreadyPending: You already have a pending verification request.
verification.fileRequired: At least one document is required.
verification.invalidFileType: Only PDF and image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP) are accepted.
verification.badgeTooltip: This business has been verified by our admin team.

notification.verificationApproved: Your business has been verified! You now have a trust badge and fast-lane eligibility.
notification.verificationRejected: Your verification request was not approved. Please review the feedback and resubmit.

report.modalDescription: Help us keep the job board safe. Your report will be reviewed by an admin.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe why you are reporting this posting (min 20 characters)...
report.descriptionHint: Minimum 20 characters. Be as specific as possible.
report.reportSuccess: Your report has been submitted. Thank you for helping keep the platform safe.
report.reportAlreadySubmitted: You have already submitted a report for this posting.
report.reportOwnPosting: You cannot report your own posting.
report.reportError: Failed to submit report. Please try again.

seeker.headlineHelp: A short tagline employers see first.
seeker.summaryPlaceholder: Briefly introduce yourself and your experience.
seeker.skillsHelp: Press Enter or comma to add a skill. Up to 30 skills.
seeker.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
seeker.errorDuplicate: You already have a seeker profile.
seeker.prefilledBanner: We pre-filled some fields from your community profile. Feel free to edit.
seeker.skillsCapReached: You can add up to 30 skills.
seeker.skillTooLong: Skill must be 50 characters or fewer.
seeker.preferencesDesiredRolesCapReached: You can add up to 20 desired roles.
seeker.preferencesLocationsCapReached: You can add up to 20 preferred locations.
seeker.preferencesSalaryRangeError: Maximum salary must be greater than minimum.
seeker.cvLimitReached: You have reached the maximum of 5 CVs.
seeker.cvFileTypeError: Only PDF and DOCX files are accepted.
seeker.cvFileSizeError: File must be 10 MB or less.
seeker.cvHelp: Upload up to 5 CVs (PDF or DOCX, max 10 MB each).
seeker.visibilityActiveDesc: You are actively looking for a job. Employers can discover your profile.
seeker.visibilityPassiveDesc: Open to opportunities, but not actively searching.
seeker.visibilityHiddenDesc: Your profile is hidden from employers.
seeker.consentMatchingDesc: Allow the platform to match you with relevant job postings.
seeker.consentEmployerViewDesc: Allow employers to discover and view your profile.
seeker.consentNote: You can change these settings at any time. Changes are recorded for compliance.

confirmation.nextSteps: The employer will review your application. You'll be notified of any status changes.

withdraw.offeredWarningBody: Withdrawing now will decline the offer for this position.
withdraw.offeredConfirmCheckbox: I understand this declines the pending offer
withdraw.reasonPlaceholder: Let the employer know why you're withdrawing (optional)
withdraw.reasonHelp: Max 500 characters. This is shared with the employer.
withdraw.toastError: Failed to withdraw application. Please try again.
withdraw.errorInvalidTransition: This application can no longer be withdrawn.

savedSearch.dialogDescription: Save your current search to get alerts for new matching jobs
savedSearch.namePlaceholder: e.g., Remote Engineering Jobs in Lagos
savedSearch.frequencyInstantDescription: Get notified as soon as a new match is found (max 5/day)
